name: Verifica_MenuPrgBien
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 22, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado22 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 23, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado23 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 24, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado24 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
IF nEstado22=0 AND nEstado23=0 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 24, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 25, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado22=1 AND nEstado23=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 24, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 25, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
ELSE IF nEstado22=1 OR nEstado23=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 24, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 25, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
END
nEstado24=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked

SIATEC1_IA
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 21, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado22=1 AND nEstado23=1 AND nEstado24=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado22=0 AND nEstado23=0 AND nEstado24=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado22=1 OR nEstado23=1 OR nEstado24=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado22=-1 OR nEstado23=-1 OR nEstado24=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Verifica_MenuPrgServ
